title: David Harbour Joins ‘John Rambo’ as Major Trautman
content:
ByPat Saperstein

Deputy Editor

“Stranger Things” starDavid Harbouris the latest addition to the cast of “John Rambo,” the origin story of the franchise. Harbour will play Rambo’s commanding officer Major Trautman in the film directed by Jalmari Helander (“Sisu”),Varietyhas confirmed.

Noah Centineo stars as John Rambo, the one-man fighting force. The “John Rambo” story takes place before 1982’s “First Blood,” the Sylvester Stallone movie that started the popular Rambo franchise. The John Rambo character was a Vietnam veteran and Special Forces soldier who is the last surviving member of his unit. Though traumatized by his Vietnam experience, he developed military skills that he used to fight corrupt police and drug cartels.

“John Rambo” has wrapped production in Thailand. Also appearing in the film are Yao (“Sinners”), Jason Tobin (“A Thousand Blows”), Quincy Isaiah (“Winning Time: The Rise of the Lakers Dynasty”), Jefferson White (“Yellowstone”) and Tayme Thapthimthong (“The White Lotus”).

Two-time Emmy nominee Harbour is currently appearing as Floyd Smernitch in “DTF St. Louis,” and recently starred in “Stranger Things” and “Thunderbolts*.” He has a big year coming up with “Avengers: Doomsday” in December plus “Violent Night 2” and “Evil Genius,” and he’s also in production on Lionsgate’s “A Head Full of Ghosts.”

Rory Haines and Sohrab Noshirvani wrote the screenplay for “John Rambo,” which is produced by Lionsgate, Millennium Media, Templeton Media and AGBO, and will be distributed by Lionsgate.

Producers are Kevin King Templeton for Templeton Media, Les Weldon, Jonathan Yunger for Millennium Media, and Angela Russo-Otstot and Michael Disco for AGBO. Executive producers include Anthony and Joe Russo, Trevor Short, and Dallas Sonnier and Amanda Presmyk for Bonfire Legend, alongside Stallone. The film is produced by Lionsgate, Millennium Media, Templeton Media, and AGBO, and will be distributed by Lionsgate.

Harbour is represented by WME and Sloane, Offer, Weber & Dern.
title_zh: 大衛·哈伯(David Harbour)加盟《第一滴血》(First Blood)飾演特勞特曼少校(Major Trautman)。
content_zh:
作者：帕特·薩佩斯坦 (Pat Saperstein)

副編輯

《怪奇物語》(Stranger Things) 的明星大衛·哈伯(David Harbour) 是《約翰·藍波》(John Rambo) 演員陣容的最新成員，這部電影是該系列的起源故事。哈伯在由雅爾馬里·赫蘭德(Jalmari Helander) 執導的電影中飾演藍波的指揮官特勞特曼少校(Major Trautman)，《綜藝》(Variety) 已確認此消息。

諾亞·辛提尼奧(Noah Centineo) 飾演約翰·藍波(John Rambo)，這位獨行俠戰士。故事發生在1982年的《第一滴血》(First Blood) 之前，該電影由西爾維斯特·史泰龍(Sylvester Stallone) 主演，開啟了受歡迎的藍波系列。約翰·藍波是一名越戰老兵和特種部隊士兵，是他部隊中最後的生還者。儘管因越戰經歷而受到創傷，他卻發展出軍事技能，用以對抗腐敗的警察和毒品卡特爾。

《約翰·藍波》已在泰國完成拍攝。電影中還有姚(Yao)、《千擊》(A Thousand Blows) 的傑森·托賓(Jason Tobin)、《贏得時光：湖人王朝的崛起》(Winning Time: The Rise of the Lakers Dynasty) 的昆西·艾賽亞(Quincy Isaiah)、《黃石》(Yellowstone) 的傑佛遜·懷特(Jefferson White) 和泰美·塔普提蒙(Tayme Thapthimthong) 的演出。

兩度艾美獎提名的哈伯目前在《DTF 聖路易斯》(DTF St. Louis) 中飾演弗洛伊德·斯梅爾尼奇(Floyd Smernitch)，並最近在《怪奇物語》和《雷霆部隊》(Thunderbolts) 中主演。他即將迎來繁忙的一年，12月將上映《復仇者：末日》(Avengers: Doomsday)，還有《暴力之夜2》(Violent Night 2) 和《邪惡天才》(Evil Genius)，他也在拍攝獅門影業(Lionsgate) 的《滿頭鬼魂》(A Head Full of Ghosts)。

羅瑞·海恩斯(Rory Haines) 和索哈布·諾希爾瓦尼(Sohrab Noshirvani) 為《約翰·藍波》撰寫劇本，該片由獅門影業、千禧媒體(Millennium Media)、坦普頓媒體(Templeton Media) 和AGBO製作，並將由獅門影業發行。

製片人包括坦普頓媒體的凱文·金·坦普頓(Kevin King Templeton)、千禧媒體的萊斯·韋爾登(Les Weldon)、喬納森·揚格(Jonathan Yunger)，以及AGBO的安吉拉·魯索·奧茲托(Angela Russo-Otstot) 和邁克爾·迪斯科(Michael Disco)。執行製片人包括安東尼·魯索(Anthony Russo) 和喬·魯索(Joe Russo)、特雷弗·肖特(Trevor Short)、達拉斯·索尼爾(Dallas Sonnier) 和阿曼達·普雷斯米克(Amanda Presmyk) 代表Bonfire Legend，以及史泰龍。該片由獅門影業、千禧媒體、坦普頓媒體和AGBO製作，並將由獅門影業發行。

哈伯由WME和斯洛恩、奧弗、韋伯與德恩(Sloane, Offer, Weber & Dern) 代理。
summary_zh:
作者：帕特·薩佩斯坦 (Pat Saperstein)

副編輯

《怪奇物語》(Stranger Things) 的明星大衛·哈伯(David Harbour) 是《約翰·藍波》(John Rambo) 演員陣容的最新成員，這部電影是該系列的起源故事。
